con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="PredictiveModelWCCService" targetNamespace="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="CalculateFactor"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimCreatedDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimantGender" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DateOfBirth" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DateReported" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedBodyParts" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBodyPartDetails"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedCauseOfInjury" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedNatureOfInjury" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EmployerName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="HowReported" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredAddress1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredAddress2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredAddress3" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredCity" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredClaimantClassCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredFirstName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredLastName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredStateCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredSuffixName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InjuredZip" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LossDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OriginalEffectiveDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="StateOfJurisdiction" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalIncurredAmount" type="xs:decimal"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimType" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CorelationId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RatingModelName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfBodyPartDetails"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="BodyPartDetails" nillable="true" type="tns:BodyPartDetails"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfBodyPartDetails" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBodyPartDetails"/> <xs:complexType name="BodyPartDetails"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DetailedBodyPart" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PrimaryBodyPartIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SequenceBodyPart" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BodyPartDetails" nillable="true" type="tns:BodyPartDetails"/> <xs:element name="CalculateFactorResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CalculateFactorResult" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CorelationId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ModelID" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ResponseDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Score" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubModleID" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BaseResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:BaseResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"/> <xs:complexType name="ErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" type="tns:ErrorType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ErrorInfo" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> <xs:simpleType name="ErrorType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="None"/> <xs:enumeration value="Validation"/> <xs:enumeration value="ServiceError"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="ErrorType" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorType"/> </xs:schema> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:CalculateFactor"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:CalculateFactorResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IWCCPredictiveModelService"> <wsdl:operation name="CalculateFactor"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities/IWCCPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactor" message="tns:IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities/IWCCPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactorResponse" message="tns:IWCCPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="BasicHttpBinding_IWCCPredictiveModelService" type="tns:IWCCPredictiveModelService"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="CalculateFactor"> <soap:operation soapAction="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities/IWCCPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactor" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="PredictiveModelWCCService"> <wsdl:port name="BasicHttpBinding_IWCCPredictiveModelService" binding="tns:BasicHttpBinding_IWCCPredictiveModelService"> <soap:address location="http://dotnetuat3.njmgroup.com/PREDICTIVEMODELWCC/PredictiveModelWCC"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

con:call.name: Request 2
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:wcc="WCCPredictiveModelService.Entities">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <wcc:CalculateFactor>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <wcc:request> <wcc:ClaimNumber>W2025-060736</wcc:ClaimNumber> <wcc:ClaimType>TL</wcc:ClaimType> <wcc:CorelationId>cbf85734-6a0d-4ce1-8d82-e7a77afd76c8</wcc:CorelationId> <wcc:PolicyNumber>1018275</wcc:PolicyNumber> <wcc:ClaimCreatedDate>2025-07-15T03:53:29-04:00</wcc:ClaimCreatedDate> <wcc:ClaimID>-41869001</wcc:ClaimID> <wcc:ClaimantGender>Female</wcc:ClaimantGender> <wcc:DateOfBirth>1966-03-26T00:01:01-05:00</wcc:DateOfBirth> <wcc:DateReported>2025-07-15T15:53:09.616-04:00</wcc:DateReported> <wcc:DetailedBodyParts> <wcc:BodyPartDetails> <wcc:DetailedBodyPart>Chest</wcc:DetailedBodyPart> <wcc:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator>Yes</wcc:PrimaryBodyPartIndicator> <wcc:SequenceBodyPart>100</wcc:SequenceBodyPart> </wcc:BodyPartDetails> </wcc:DetailedBodyParts> <wcc:DetailedCauseOfInjury>Miscellaneous - other</wcc:DetailedCauseOfInjury> <wcc:DetailedNatureOfInjury>Other specific injury</wcc:DetailedNatureOfInjury> <wcc:EmployerName>Inserra Supermarkets Inc</wcc:EmployerName> <wcc:HowReported>Web</wcc:HowReported> <wcc:InjuredAddress1>1003 Avenue C</wcc:InjuredAddress1> <wcc:InjuredAddress2>Apt 5</wcc:InjuredAddress2> <wcc:InjuredCity>Bayonne</wcc:InjuredCity> <wcc:InjuredClaimantClassCode>80330 - Store- Meat Grocery And Provisi</wcc:InjuredClaimantClassCode> <wcc:InjuredFirstName>Connie</wcc:InjuredFirstName> <wcc:InjuredLastName>Di Vincent</wcc:InjuredLastName> <wcc:InjuredStateCode>NJ</wcc:InjuredStateCode> <wcc:InjuredZip>07002</wcc:InjuredZip> <wcc:LossDate>2025-05-06T00:01:01-04:00</wcc:LossDate> <wcc:OriginalEffectiveDate>2010-06-01T00:00:00-04:00</wcc:OriginalEffectiveDate> <wcc:PolicyState>NJ</wcc:PolicyState> <wcc:StateOfJurisdiction>NJ</wcc:StateOfJurisdiction> <wcc:TotalIncurredAmount>15998</wcc:TotalIncurredAmount> </wcc:request> </wcc:CalculateFactor>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>
